episodes.title: My David Sullivan Story Part 2 | Background & Context
episodes.description:
For the last two weeks my story about David Sullivan has appeared across national newspapers, BBC Panorama and news outlets around the country as part of the wider 3yr investigation by the BBC and The Times which reported on similar stories from seven other women.  This video gives you a little more background and context to my story

Thanks for all the support since the news broke, it helps me and encourages others to find their voice and come forward.

Please leave your questions below and I will respond to as many as I can in my next video

Do you have information relevant to this investigation? Get in touch at sullivaninvestigation@bbc.co.uk

🔗 Visit: https://istreem.media

📺 Subscribe: https://youtube.com/@sachaistreem

📰 Read my articles & updates:
https://substack.com/@sachaistreem

https://onlysacha.com

https://wbutd.org

episodes.title: About My David Sullivan Story | Essex P*rn Baron
episodes.description:
Thank you for ALL the support shown this week 

Monday night the BBC & The Times broke the news on their investigation into David Sullivan and Panorama went out with my story

If anyone would like to share their stories please reach out to me on any of my socials, all will be treated with the upmost confidence

I recorded this video as the news was breaking, it's been a busy week so i've only just uploaded, I am recording my full uncut story to give more context, will be forthcoming soon

Thank you for ALL the support shown, Sacha Wall x
